changelog: Notifications: per-type preferences, unread indicators, avatars, group dismiss, due date reminders
Browser push notifications: VAPID Web Push with sound toggle, works with tab closed
Recurring tasks: run history, Run Now, preview, search/filter, pause/resume, auto-tag, duplicate
Reporting: client reports builder, CSV/Excel export, column picker, sparkline bars, tag filter
Reporting: scheduled auto-generation, email delivery, report duplication, print-friendly layout
Security: TOTP 2FA with QR setup, backup codes, rate-limited login, per-role enforcement
Settings: dedicated Security tab, consequence hints on non-obvious settings across all tabs
i18n: all remaining hardcoded UI strings wrapped in t() for translation
